justification: The question asks for a forecast regarding the effective yield of corporate debt securities (bonds) tracking a specific ICE BofA index.
question: Will the effective yield of securities with an investment grade rating of B in the ICE BofA US High Yield Master II Index, which tracks the performance of corporate debt below investment grade in the US domestic market, have increased by each resolution date listed below as compared to its value on 2025-06-08?
